events.title: Gourmet Sunday Brunch
events.description: You havent had brunch until you've enjoyed Hotel Eldorados renowned and gourmet Sunday Brunch. Year after year voted Best Brunch in the Okanagan, this brunch features actions stations, daily market fresh selection of fish and meats, eggs benedict, bountiful desserts, various fresh fruits, all the traditional breakfast offerings and so much more! Sunday Brunch at the El - an Okanagan tradition amongst patrons of Kelowna restaurants! Reservations are strongly recommended.

events.title: Drag Brunch with Joan & Janice Everyday
events.description: Prepare for an out-of-this-world brunch experience with the intergalactic duo Joan & Janice Everyday! These alien queens bring otherworldly energy, structured performances, and all the fabulous chaos you need to start your Sunday right.

events.description: Cheers to Cheese is the Westside Wine Trail's annual wine and cheese paired tasting event - perfect for those who appreciate the art of a good pairing.

events.title: Jazz'd Brunch & Quailsgate with Anna & Loni
events.address: 3303 Boucherie Road, West Kelowna, BC, Canada,
events.description: Settle into a Saturday ritual: Jazz’d Brunch at Quails’ Gate Old Vines Restaurant from 11 AM to 2 PM. Award-winning vocalist Anna Jacyszyn and guitar virtuoso Loni Moger bring smooth, sophisticated sounds to the table, literally transforming leisurely brunches into something truly memorable. Pair their sultry tones with stunning vineyard views, a menu you’ll never tire of, and a glass (or bottle) of Quails’ Gate’s renowned wines. It’s the kind of experience that’s all about lingering a little longer, laughing a little louder, and letting the music set the mood to the rest of your day!

events.title: Chips & Wine Tasting
events.description: Are you intimidated by the expansive world of chips? Do you stress out in grocery store aisles about making the wrong choice for that upcoming high-stakes party? If so, book this tasting now and boost your chipping confidence for life. Sniff, swirl, crunch and savour a fine selection of chips, accompanied by the world’s most accessible beverage: wine! This seated tasting features five delectably-paired Arrowleaf beverages that you'll learn a little more about too.

events.title: Ballet Kelowna presents Cikilaxʷm: Controlled Burn
events.description: Ballet Kelowna presents the world premiere of the company’s second commissioned, full-length work, Cikilaxʷm: Controlled Burn, co-produced by the National Arts Centre’s National Creation Fund, on stage at the Kelowna Community Theatre on May 1 + 2, 2026. Choreographed by Ballet Kelowna Associate Artist Cameron sink Fraser-Monroe, the two-act narrative contemporary ballet is set in a dystopian future where wildfire season has no end. The work follows a young Indigenous firefighter, whose beliefs are challenged when he meets Mothkʷ, a fierce protector of ancestral knowledge who carries out cultural burns–a traditional Indigenous practice that nourishes the land by proactively burning debris, and thereby protecting trees, wildlife, and communities from the ravages of wildfire. Developed by an Indigenous-led creative team, Cikilaxʷm: Controlled Burn features an original score by award-winning Cree composer and cellist Cris Derksen, immersive digital projections from Euro/Omushkego Cree artist Andy Moro, and costumes by Navajo/Cherokee designer Asa Benally. Tickets and information at balletkelowna.ca

events.title: Spectrum Singers Kelowna ~ Syncopated Voices
events.description: Spectrum Singers Kelowna is excited to present Syncopated Voices, a dynamic choral performance featuring nine memorized works spanning popular music, film scores, and contemporary arrangements.

events.title: Trivia Thursday at King Taps
events.description: Join us for Trivia Night every Thursday from 6-8 PM at King Taps Kelowna Lakeside! Bring your A-game and your friends for a chance to be crowned Trivia Champion. Score a $50 King Taps gift card for your team if you win, and enjoy our exclusive trivia night 2/$30 pizza deal.

events.title: Atomic Vapor presents Open Mic Comedy for Foodbank
events.description: Laugh Out Loud for a Great Cause! Calling all comedy fans! Get ready for a night of side-splitting hilarity at the Open Mic Comedy Night, benefiting the Central Okanagan Food Bank, proudly presented by Atomic Vapor at Dakoda’s Comedy Lounge!

events.title: Floor Opener
events.description: Lawrence Paul Yuxweluptun is one of Canada’s most outspoken and influential contemporary artists, confronting colonial suppression, environmental degradation, and the ongoing struggles for Indigenous sovereignty. Of Cowichan (Hul’q’umi’num Coast Salish) and Okanagan (Syilx) descent, his forty-year practice brings together traditional iconography, fearless critique, and biting satire to challenge and unsettle. events.title: Blossom & Bites: A Spring Lunch for Two
events.description: A Springtime Meadery lunch for TWO! Enjoy the Spring Sunshine on our farm! Start with a Local, Charcuterie Bento Lunch in our Picnic Area or our picturesque outdoor Bistro and a guided wine tasting or flight of our honey wines. Take our self-guided Bee Tour, take the Honeybee Challenge, play lawn games & enjoy farm fun. Finish your experience with a scrumptious local Bernard Callebaut Chocolate Brownie with homemade honey ice cream for two! Includes: Bento Local Charcuterie for two Loca
